title: Punchy
description: Make the world more vibrant! Punchy cranks Minecraft up a notch.
body:
# **Punchy**

This resourcepack draws out more color to make Minecraft more colorful. This is also applied to Colormaps, Entities*, and other misc parts of the game. Some things have been excluded for aesthetical and or functional reasons.

**Excluded Features**
- Hardened Clay (Terracotta)
- Wool- Concrete (Powder & Block)
- Banners
- Water Overlay
- Armor
- Game GUI
- Particles
- Certain mob entities*

**Bonus Features**
- See-through Scaffolding
- Improved pumpkin-on-head effect

*Changed or not changed entities will be stated in update changelogs

# **Looking for more?**

For more information, visit my official site at https://www.mystic7055.com
